orchestrator.description: Main coordinator for long-running tasks. Spawns coder and reviewer subagents. Runs the 4-phase execution loop.

coder.description: Implementation specialist. Writes code following TDD.

adversarial-reviewer.description: Adversarial code reviewer. Finds FAILURES in implementation against spec. Binary PASS/FAIL with file:line evidence.

planner.description: Creates implementation plans with work unit decomposition, DoD items, and file scopes.

swarm-coordinator.description: Top-level coordinator for multiple parallel workstreams. Spawns orchestrator agents.
